coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 24 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 4 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/4. Target: 108% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 3:00 at 108%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/4. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/4. 108% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 40% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 3min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 40% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 40% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. 110% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 3:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 59% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 59% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 59% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. 112% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 69% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 9min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 69% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 21 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 108%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 108-108% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 3 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 108-108% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 88% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 27 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 88% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 3:30. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
